keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 1, Guatemala 0. Andreaw Gravillon (Guadeloupe) header from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Jordan Leborgne with a cross   following a corner.
Rodrigo Saravia (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ange-Freddy Plumain (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 1, Guatemala 1. Rubio Rubín (Guatemala) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Esteban García with a cross.
Davy Rouyard (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Guatemala. Jorge Aparicio replaces Óscar Castellanos.
Substitution, Guatemala. Marlon Sequén replaces Rodrigo Saravia.
